name: knox
description: Security enforcement for AI coding agents. Blocks dangerous commands, audits every tool call, detects prompt injection.

interface.shortDescription: Pre-execution policy enforcement for shell, file edits, MCP tools, and prompts
interface.longDescription: Knox blocks dangerous commands, miners, prompt injection, and protected-file writes before they execute. 88 blocklist patterns plus tokenized rm/find parsers, recursive bash -c unwrap, exfiltration-conjunction detection, and continuous audit logging. Same engine on Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
